title: H&S Pestle and Mortar Set, Premium Solid Granite Stone Mortar and Pestle Large Black - 16cm (6.3") Diameter - Pestle and Mortar Large
features: Premium Quality Granite: Crafted from 100% solid granite, this H&S pestle and mortar set guarantees lasting durability and exceptional performance, making it your reliable culinary companion.

Versatile Mixing Surface: With a thoughtfully designed inner surface, this pestle and mortar excels in handling both dry and wet ingredients. Effortlessly grind and blend a variety of herbs, spices, and more for enhanced flavors in your dishes.

Dimensions: Our H&S Granite Mortar and Pestle Set is designed with your convenience in mind. The dimensions of Mortar: 16cm (6.3”) x 8cm (3.15”), Interior Bowl: 12cm (4.7”) x 6cm (2.4”), Pestle: 17.5cm (6.9”) x 4.3cm (1.7”).

Ergonomic Design: The long, easy-grip handle provides comfortable maneuverability, allowing you to crush and grind ingredients with precision and ease. Its robust construction ensures it can withstand heavy and frequent usage without compromise.

Easy Cleaning: Featuring a polished granite exterior, cleaning up after food preparation becomes a breeze. Maintain the pristine condition of your pestle and mortar set with minimal effort, ensuring a clean cooking environment.
